body:
# Description

Create integration tests for Phase 0.

# [PKT-FND-010](task-0031): Integration Tests

## Purpose

Create integration tests for Phase 0.

## Scope

- Test coverage
- Integration points
- Test data

## Implementation

1. Define test cases
2. Implement tests
3. Add test data

## Acceptance Criteria

1. All integration points tested
2. Tests pass consistently
3. Coverage is adequate
